skill_availability_goal: Verify isolated candidate construction, candidate_verified without ready, two complete raw-metadata staged gates, anchor confirmation, fixed discovery handoff, handoff commit anchoring, and ready_for_tag only after integration.
prompt: 执行 fixture 中定义的 pre-tag audit。维护者已明确确认 `target_release_version: v1.2.0`，`base_ref: v1.1.0`、`target_ref: release-head`，且同名 tag 尚不存在。全部事实通过后，在隔离 worktree 内统一盖章并生成 candidate_verified 记录；对初稿和最终记录各执行完整 staged gate。创建并确认 anchor commit 后才写固定 discovery handoff，再创建并确认 handoff commit；只有正常 fast-forward 集成和回读通过才向 #120 handoff。
